title: aneilema ovalifolium
intro: Aneilema ovalifolium, also known as the oval-leaf Aneilema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Aneilema ovalifolium include the treatment of wounds, skin infections, and fever, as well as its use as a diuretic to relieve kidney problems. Herbal preparations of Aneilema ovalifolium typically involve the leaves, which can be dried and made into teas or infusions, or used in topical applications to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
